subject: Staryu, a star-shaped aquatic creature glowing with energy in an explosive radiant scene
description: A rigid, five-pointed star-shaped creature is depicted in a dramatic radiant explosion of orange and yellow energy. The figure is a hard brown-tan star shape with a glowing red gem or core at its center. Rays of intense orange and yellow light radiate outward from the creature in all directions, as if it is emitting or surrounded by tremendous heat or energy. The background is consumed by this radiant burst, making the star form stand out as a dark silhouette against the blaze. The palette is fiery oranges, yellows, and dark browns.
foreground: five-pointed star-shaped creature with glowing red gem center
background: explosive radiant burst of orange and yellow light
